features: BaseContract: abstract foundation for all data contracts (versioning, enforce(), registry, serialization)
ContractRegistry: auto-registration via __init_subclass__ — no manual wiring
IContractPlugin: base for ABC/Protocol plugin contracts (ISemanticPlugin, IComprehensionPlugin, etc.)
IngestionContract: SourceDescriptor, IngestionQuality, NormalizedChunk, IngestionPayload v1.0.0
IIngestionPlugin: domain extension point for Perception Sacred Order
Pipeline Contract Enforcement: @enforced decorator for LangGraph nodes (from v1.7.0)
Node Contracts Registry: 20 nodes audited with verified requires/produces (from v1.7.0)
documentation: All existing imports backward compatible — zero breaking changes

features: Pipeline Contract Enforcement: @enforced decorator for LangGraph nodes (FASE 1)

CONTRACT_ENFORCE_MODE env var: warn (default) | strict | off — zero overhead in off mode

BUCO 3: codex_hunters bypasses orthodoxy → orthodoxy fields set on all 3 return paths (FASE 4)

BUCO 7: Domain extension nodes unwrapped → _wrap() applied in domain loop (FASE 3)

RAG_ENFORCE_MODE=strict now raises ValueError on missing payload.source (was warn-only)
